case_title: BANK ONE ASSIGNEE OF BANK ONE VS. TRACY APODACA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK ONE AS TO DEFENDANT APODACA, TRACY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-29-2010

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT APODACA, TRACY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK ONE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APODACA, TRACY $3,599.69 PRINCIPAL, $392.51 INTEREST, $267.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,259.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
